msg: List all test files under src/cortex/__tests__/ and briefly describe what each tests based on filename

        "text": "Here's the breakdown:\n\n**Unit tests:**\n- **adapters.test.ts** — LLM provider adapters (request/response translation)\n- **bus.test.ts** — Internal event bus / message routing\n- **channel-adapter.test.ts** — Channel-specific message formatting (WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.)\n- **context.test.ts** — Context window assembly & truncation\n- **gardener.test.ts** — Context gardening / pruning logic\n- **hippocampus.test.ts** — Memory subsystem (storage/retrieval)\n- **hippocampus-context.test.ts** — Memory injection into context\n- **index.test.ts** — Cortex module exports / initialization\n- **loop.test.ts** — Main agent loop (message → think → respond cycle)\n- **output.test.ts** — Output formatting / post-processing\n- **recovery.test.ts** — Error recovery & retry logic\n- **session.test.ts** — Session state management\n- **shadow.test.ts** — Shadow sessions (background/parallel processing)\n- **tools.test.ts** — Tool call parsing & execution\n- **types.test.ts** — Type guards / validation\n\n**End-to-end tests:**\n- **e2e-delegation.test.ts** — Task delegation to sub-agents\n- **e2e-handoff.test.ts** — Session handoff between agents\n- **e2e-hippocampus.test.ts** — Memory system integration\n- **e2e-llm-caller.test.ts** — Full LLM request/response pipeline\n- **e2e-multichannel.test.ts** — Multi-channel message routing\n- **e2e-op-lifecycle.test.ts** — Operation lifecycle (create → run → complete)\n- **e2e-priority.test.ts** — Message priority & queuing\n- **e2e-recovery.test.ts** — Crash recovery flows\n- **e2e-shadow.test.ts** — Shadow session integration\n- **e2e-silence.test.ts** — Silent/NO_REPLY handling\n- **e2e-subagent.test.ts** — Sub-agent spawning & orchestration\n- **e2e-task-ownership.test.ts** — Task ownership & conflict resolution\n\n27 test files total — 15 unit, 12 e2e.",

      }
